_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of major data protection regulations and their applicability criteria, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, LGPD, POPI Act, and emerging state and national privacy laws, sufficient to determine which regulations apply to a given data processing activity.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-002 (SP, cosine: 0.581), SP-K-014 (SP, cosine: 0.579).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.576). Shared vocabulary: [data, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [identifiable, information, personally, pii, security, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [act, activity, applicability, apply, ccpa, cpra] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.877, R=0.838). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 35 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.5%, N:62.9%, C:36.6%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards." vs "Knowledge of major data protection regulations and their applicability criteria," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.612 ≈ STS 0.576 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.1%. Shared tokens: [data, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [identifiable, information, personally, pii, security, standards]. WIDAI-only: [act, activity, applicability, apply, ccpa, cpra].
